name: Triple Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package of chocolate pudding mix (not instant)
1 pint skimmed chocolate milk (Yoo-Hoo will work in a pinch)
1 box Pillsbury lite chocolate cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees. You may spray a 9 x 13 inch pan, but it comes out fine without the grease.
2 Cook pudding with chocolate milk according to package directions. Remove from heat and add cake mix. Stir until combined.
3 Spread batter into baking pan. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
4 Bake at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes, until tester comes out clean.
This recipe yields approximately 16 servings. Per serving, there are 3.8 grams of fat and 180 calories with no cholesterol.
